problem id: 7b412ac0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11000101 -> 00101011
  00110001 -> 10001000
  00011101 -> 11101000
  01110100 -> 10100001
  01001100 -> 01100001
  00001110 -> 01110000
  10110101 -> 10101010
  01101101 -> 01101001
  00011000 -> 11000000
  11000100 -> 00100011

query: 10011101
predicted answer: 11101010
